body: Rev. Angela Dawson confirmed her bio blurb by email - she's happy with the one we used on air. Will format and commit by Tuesday.
TJ confirmed the sponsor contact details for Covenant Insurance and Mitchell's Flowers. Need to follow up with Bluff City Auto Care for their correct web address before I publish.
Index page looks good. Merging - all links verified against the individual show note files.
Sandra Coles reviewed her segment transcript from the November 15 episode and gave the go-ahead to publish. All four show notes look clean - merging.
README pushed. TJ said it's clear enough. Kept it to one page - folder map, episode naming convention, and how to open a show notes issue.
Pastor Greer's quote and the Henri Nouwen reference are already written up from my broadcast notes. Just need to format into the standard template. Will do Wednesday evening after radio prep.
APC conference certificate scanned and saved locally. Hours logged: 8 conference + 6 supervision = 14 hrs through February. Closing this one.
Supervision log through February updated. Still need to add March 3 and March 10 sessions with Dr. Vickers - those are 2 hrs each so total will be 28 when done. 22 left before December 31.
Dr. Vickers and I drafted the template together during our December 15 supervision session. It's straightforward - date, learning theme, key insight, application to practice. Will commit this week.
4 hours logged from the Dec 10 APC orientation webinar. Repo is set up and ready. Will use this to track the full 50 hours needed by December 31, 2026.
Deacon Mosley and I met after church January 11 to sketch out the health fair timeline. Targeting Saturday October 3. Will push the draft checklist this week.
Pastor Greer reviewed the meditation text and gave a thumbs up. Merging so it's in the archive before Sunday.
Starting this early so Deacon Mosley can review it before the fall. Last year's run-of-show notes are in my files - will use them as the base template.
Short service, simple bulletin. Pastor Greer approved the text - just two pages. Merging before the holiday weekend.

Working on the speaking page layout this week. Want to keep it simple - a short paragraph, three past highlights, and the contact link to rebecca.price@memorialhospital-mem.org. No booking form for now.
Confirmed on iPhone 15 Pro - header breaks at 375px width. Likely a flex-wrap issue on the nav. Will look at it this weekend after the broadcast.
One-line fix. Link verified - @morningreflectionsrebecca opens correctly on mobile and desktop. Merging.
Copy changes are minimal but the numbers matter for accuracy. Verified the WGSP 1490 AM page still lists Saturday 7-9 AM - good. PR is clean, merging.
